headline: Chevron (CVX)’s CEO Say’s Venezuela Needs to Lower Taxes For the Company Invests Fresh Capital
summary: Chevron Corporation (NYSE:CVX) is one of the Best Low Cost Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. According to a May 29 report by Bloomberg, Chevron’s CEO Mike Wirth noted that the company will not invest fresh capital in Venezuela next year unless the country lowers its taxes and royalties on oil production. ​Chevron Corporation […]

headline: Decoupling Exxon's Production Growth From Market Reality
summary: Exxon Mobil (NYSE: XOM) boasts an immense global footprint, but Q1 2026 production dipped to 4.6 million barrels per day from 5.0 million in Q4 2025.

headline: The Iranian regime fears its people more than the bombs or sanctions, says Richard Goldberg

headline: Chevron CEO sends blunt message on oil, the economy
summary: Oil is up more than 50% since the Iran war began. The Strait of Hormuz is running at less than 10% of normal vessel traffic.
